gods.label: Competitor: Logitech Actions Ring (reference product) - polished drag-drop GUI, contextual plugins, analog adjustment bars, Smart Actions macros, signed installer, hardware trigger+haptics on MX Master 4; weaknesses: requires Logitech hardware+internet+account, 10-20s cold-start, fragile LogiPluginService, 8-slot/1-level-folder cap, no disable toggle/game mode, heavy background processes, telemetry concerns
M1 - MVP (wk 3-8): F1 core, F2.1-2.4, F3.1-3.7, F4.1/4.3/4.4, F6.1-6.3, F7 basic editor, F9.1-9.2, F10 targets. Exit: daily-drivable, all P0s demoable, perf budgets green
Action Ring PRD - full product requirements document (Draft v1.0, July 14 2026)
M2 - v1.0 public (wk 9-14): F5 adjustments, F7 full editor+onboarding+icons, F8.1 presets, F2.5-2.6, installer/signing, diagnostics. Exit: all P0 complete, crash-free >=99.5% in beta
